title: Real estate Photo edit
brief: Hello, My name is Kimberley and I am currently starting my business as a real estate photographer in the Netherlands. I am looking for a reliable long-term photo editing partner who can grow with my business. At the moment, I have a project of 25–30 real estate photos for now. For this project, I need the following editing services: * HDR merge / exposure blending * Vertical and horizontal line correction * Color correction and white balance adjustment * Natural window views (window pull) * Removal of distracting objects where necessary * General image enhancement while maintaining a realistic appearance Quality requirements The photos are intended for the Dutch and European real estate market. Please pay special attention to: * Natural-looking colors * Bright but realistic interiors * Straight walls and vertical lines * Clean and professional presentation * Preserving outdoor views through windows * No oversaturated colors or unrealistic HDR effects The editing style should match the expectations of Dutch real estate listings (similar to Funda): bright, clean, realistic, and professional. Delivery * High-resolution JPG files * Consistent editing style across all images * Delivery within your normal turnaround time Questions Could you please let me know: 1. Your price per photo for this project? 2. Your price per photo for future ongoing work? 3. Your typical turnaround time? 4. Do you have experience editing real estate photos for dutch clients? Thank you, and I look forward
